name: think-it-through
description: A thinking deck built on the Human-Agent Control Protocol, with 16 cards that compose across agent workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Think freely. The agent follows your lead.
interface.longDescription: Sixteen conversation cards clarify, explore, extend, test, preserve, explain, and operationalize thought while passing results across HACP decks.
defaultPrompt: $think-it-through:help Help me choose how to continue this conversation.
$think-it-through:recap Recover the full shape of this conversation.
$think-it-through:to-brief Turn this thinking into a reusable brief.
